codes.description: The manifest is not well-formed YAML.
The manifest top level is a sequence or scalar instead of a mapping.
The top-level pack: field is absent.
The pack: field is not one of the supported spec versions.
The pack: field is present but not a valid version string.
A field required by the current spec version is absent.
The author block is absent.
The description field is absent or empty.
The data: block (reads/writes/stores/phones_home) is absent.
The skills: block is absent or empty.
The version field is not a semver major.minor.patch.
The description exceeds the per-spec character limit.
The licence field is not an SPDX identifier.
A service referenced in requires.services is not in services.yaml.
A capability referenced in requires_capabilities is not in capabilities.yaml.
A skill's category is not in skill-categories.yaml.
The visibility field is not 'open' or 'sealed'.
The tier field is not 'certified', 'verified', or 'community'.
The author.type field is not 'first-party' or 'community'.
The readiness field is not in the closed enum.
The pricing.model field is not in the closed enum.
A value in data.stores is not in the closed enum.
A pack declares writes but has no corresponding gate acknowledgement.
visibility sealed but required seal metadata is absent.
A service operation referenced is not in that contract's published operations.
The name contains disallowed characters or is reserved.
Two skills in the pack share a name.
A sealed pack's signature does not validate against the author's published key.
A sealed pack's HMAC does not match the cleartext payload.
